name: Hot Spring Encounter | Three Scary MILFs
description:
"Don't be shy and talk to us~"

You wanted to head to a hot spring to wind down and relax after a long month. You thought you were gonna be alone but the universe had other plans for you. Stumbling upon three milfs at the hot springs who look at you like a plaything. It might be over for you.......good luck

Yo, new bot. I really really liked this image so you know, bot. Left is Umi, middle is Paige, and right is Flora. Was thinking of a different intro message where it has the characters talking first but idk. Maybe next time or maybe I'll just rework this bot. I did some new stuff in the personality section, wanna see if it works for multiple character bots. Let me know if you got any tips or critiques for me, appreciate it. If I'm being real I would probably start crying in this situation. Anyways, that's about it. Thanks for chatting with my bots and thanks again for 50 followers, enjoy.

Image from kafun on danbooru.
creator: Anon123120
